subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-19 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: How very unjust the people are! From the day of the appearance of his holiness, Christ
subcodes.first_line_orig: واقعا چه قدر مردم بی انصافند از روزیکه حضرت مسیح ظاهر شده تا یومنا هذا نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution
